name: Alaska Matelote
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon.
2. Make juice for the fish stock, up to 300 milliliters (1/2 pint) using water.
3. Break the fish into large chunks.
4. Heat the oil.
5. Gently fry the spring onions and garlic.
6. Stir in the flour.
7. Add the fish and vegetable stocks and cider. Mix well.
8. Stir in basil and lemon juice. Bring to a boil.
9. Add prawns, mussels, and white fish. Simmer for 10 minutes.
10. Cook mushrooms and onion in salt water. Drain and set aside.
11. Stir salmon into the soup. Heat through.
12. Serve garnished with mushrooms and onions.
Serves 6. Approx. 290 kcals per serving
